name: FTV Titanium Mouthpiece
summary: The FTV Mighty Vaporiser and Crafty+ from Storz & Bickel both come equipped with a powerful titanium mouthpiece.
description: The FTV Mighty Vaporiser and Crafty+ from Storz & Bickel both come equipped with a powerful titanium mouthpiece. Please note the cooling unit is not included. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
